name: 知识库内容更新与维护
name_en: Knowledge base content update and maintenance

observable_attributes.edit_strategy: how existing files are modified: incremental additions vs. section rewrites; number and size of edits per file
observable_attributes.directory_style: whether existing directory structure is preserved or reorganized; whether new subdirectories are created for new content
observable_attributes.version_strategy: whether old content is preserved (backup/archive) or directly modified; whether index file is updated
observable_attributes.naming: whether new files follow the same naming convention as existing ones

depends_on_note: Decoupled from T-03. Now uses a fixed pre-built knowledge base workspace for all profiles (ensures same starting point).
prompt_zh: 你之前搭建了一个「投资分析方法论」知识库。现在有三条新信息需要纳入：(1) 新增一个「技术分析基础」模块，涵盖移动平均线、RSI、MACD等基本指标；(2) 在基本面分析框架中补充「自由现金流折现模型（DCF）」的详细说明；(3) 更新索引文件以反映所有变更。请在现有知识库基础上完成这些更新。
prompt_en: You previously built an 'Investment Analysis Methodology' knowledge base. Now three new pieces of information need to be incorporated: (1) Add a new 'Technical Analysis Basics' module covering basic indicators like moving averages, RSI, and MACD; (2) Add detailed explanation of the 'Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) Model' to the fundamental analysis framework; (3) Update the index file to reflect all changes. Please complete these updates on the existing knowledge base.
behavioral_freedom: Whether to add new content as new files or append to existing files
Whether to reorganize the existing structure to accommodate new modules
How the index/README is updated: minimal addition vs. comprehensive rewrite
Whether to preserve version history of modified files (backup/rename old version)
Depth of new content: brief overview vs. detailed guide with examples
Whether to add cross-references between new and existing content
